title: Kings Live In Palaces, And Pigs In Sties
content:
Kings live in Palaces, and Pigs in sties,
    And youth in Expectation. Youth is wise.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Hilaire Belloc delivers a powerful performance in "Kings Live In Palaces, And Pigs In Sties"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
